description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent driveway leading to a double garage. The facade features a mix of large rectangular windows, some of which are grouped in symmetrical rows, and two curved bay window sections. The main entryway is set back under an arched overhang, flanked by two small landscaped areas with trees. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, and the driveway and walkways are paved with a dark, textured material. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, providing outdoor spaces on both levels.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a prominent driveway. The facade features curved bay windows, balconies, and landscaped entry areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway under an arch, double garage, curved bay windows, and landscaped areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, flat roof, and the extension of the driveway and walkways.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, secondary entry points, and the overall rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, window arrangements, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under an arched overhang, flanked by landscaped areas and accessed via a paved driveway
